data.title: Trump Media Technology Group Files Lawsuit Against Brazilian Supreme Court Judge
data.description: According to Odaily, the New York Times has revealed that Trump Media Technology Group (DJT.O) has filed a lawsuit in the U.S. Federal Court in Tampa against a judge from the Brazilian Supreme Court. The details of the case have not been disclosed.

data.title: OKX will add KAITO/USD trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, the USD trading area under OKX spot trading will add the KAITO/USD trading pair at 11:35 am on February 21, 2025 (UTC+8).

data.title: Market News: Musk plans to discuss with Trump about giving Americans $5,000 DOGE dividends
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Solid Intel, Musk plans to discuss with Trump the use of government reserves to distribute $5,000 DOGE dividends to American citizens.

data.title: Derivatives data shows traders expect ETH prices to rise ahead of April Pectra upgrade
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Derivatives data shows that investor optimism is heating up again. Traders are preparing for a rebound in ETH prices before the Pectra upgrade in April, while Solana is facing downward price pressure. Nick Forster, founder of Derive.xyz, said that ETH's seven-day implied volatility (IV) is 66% (equivalent to the six-month IV) while Bitcoin's IV is significantly lower. He expects the probability of Ethereum prices breaking through $3,000 by the end of this quarter is 30%, up from 28% last week. (THeBlock)

data.title: Canaan Technology: 88 Bitcoins mined in January 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Canaan Technology today released the unaudited monthly update of its Bitcoin mining business as of January 31, 2025, which disclosed that 88 bitcoins were mined in January 2025. At the end of the month, the number of bitcoins held on Canaan Technology's balance sheet was 1,319. The deployed computing power at the end of the month was ~6.43 EH/s, and the operating computing power at the end of the month was ~5.53 EH/s.

data.title: New Malware Targets Cryptocurrency Wallets
data.description: According to Odaily, researchers from Microsoft Threat Intelligence have identified a new variant of the XCSSET malware, initially discovered in 2020, which poses a threat to cryptocurrency wallets. This malware allows malicious actors to capture screenshots, monitor user activities, and steal data from Telegram. The updated version can also target data within the Apple Notes application and employs obfuscation techniques to evade detection. XCSSET theoretically has the capability to manipulate content viewed by end-users in browsers, potentially altering or replacing Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency addresses, which could result in funds being sent to unintended destinations. Researchers advise users to consistently check and verify any Xcode projects downloaded or cloned from repositories, as malware often spreads through infected projects. Additionally, they recommend installing applications only from trusted sources, such as official app stores of software platforms.

data.title: Trump Media and Technology Group sues Brazilian Supreme Court judge
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the New York Times, Trump Media Technology Group (DJT.O) sued the Brazilian Supreme Court judge in the US Federal Court in Tampa. (Jinshi)

data.title: Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl Urges Central Bank Governors to Study Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl urged central bank governors to study Bitcoin, emphasizing its unique potential as a reserve asset. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: AI startup ClustroAI completes $12 million Series A financing, led by Forum Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ClustroAI, an edge AI startup headquartered in San Francisco, has completed a $12 million Series A financing round led by Forum Ventures, with participation from MetaBlast and Metaverse Group. The company's total financing has reached $15 million to date, including a seed round led by NVIDIA. ClustroAI focuses on edge AI technology, allowing AI models to run on local devices without relying on cloud computing. ClustroAI plans to use the new funds to expand hardware compatibility to support chips such as FPGA, TPU, and NPU, while developing automated tools to make AI model updates more convenient. (CoinCentral)

data.title: Opinion: If the U.S. Treasury revalues ​​gold, the Fed will be in chaos
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wrightson ICAP said that under the debt ceiling, revaluing the US gold reserves may look tempting, but it will have a profound impact on the financial system, increase liquidity, and prolong the Fed's balance sheet reduction. The core idea is that the government should revalue its gold reserves from $42.22 per ounce (the legacy price of the Bretton Woods system) to the market price. Wrightson ICAP economist Lou Crandall said that it is unlikely to revalue the Treasury's gold holdings, the benefits will be minimal, and the public relations response may be confusing. (Jinshi) Earlier news, Hong Kong is considering promoting gold tokenization, and the US gold reserve audit has sparked controversy, and the crypto community supports the value of Bitcoin reserves.
